subject: [PATCH 1/2] mm/vmpressure: skip tree=true accounting on cgroup v2

2026-06-06.patch_summary: This patch adds an early return to the vmpressure() function when cgroup version 2 is used and tree=true, skipping unnecessary work that can lead to lock contention and high CPU usage. The existing code already handled the case where cgroup version 1 was used with tree=false, but this new change addresses a similar issue for cgroup version 2 with tree=true. This patch aims to improve performance by reducing the number of vmpressure() calls and eliminating unnecessary work in the kernel.
